title: xCart Pickup — cartPickupLocations filter Narrows Result Set

operations.label: add_item
operations.query: mutation { addItem(command: { storeId: "B2B-store" userId: "user-acme-store-maintainer-1" productId: "b3f5bd0c-45e4-46dc-8f2d-ad089718fc32" quantity: 1 }) { id validationErrors { errorCode errorMessage objectType } } }

operations.label: probe_baseline
probe_filter_match
probe_filter_nomatch
probe_sort_desc

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] probe_filter_match.totalCount <= probe_baseline.totalCount (filter narrows or equals total — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)
crossLayerChecks.note: probe_filter_match.totalCount <= probe_baseline.totalCount (filter narrows or equals total — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)
crossLayerChecks.resolved: probe_filter_match.totalCount <= probe_baseline.totalCount (filter narrows or equals total — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] every probe_filter_match.items[i].address.countryCode = SEED_COUNTRY (filter applied correctly) — runner-manual scan
crossLayerChecks.note: every probe_filter_match.items[i].address.countryCode = SEED_COUNTRY (filter applied correctly) — runner-manual scan
crossLayerChecks.resolved: every probe_filter_match.items[i].address.countryCode = SEED_COUNTRY (filter applied correctly) — runner-manual scan

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] probe_filter_nomatch.totalCount = 0 OR equals 1 if a confirmed pickup is set (IncludeLocationIds prepend) — covered separately by GQL-094; for fresh cart with no shipment confirmed, expect 0
crossLayerChecks.note: probe_filter_nomatch.totalCount = 0 OR equals 1 if a confirmed pickup is set (IncludeLocationIds prepend) — covered separately by GQL-094; for fresh cart with no shipment confirmed, expect 0
crossLayerChecks.resolved: probe_filter_nomatch.totalCount = 0 OR equals 1 if a confirmed pickup is set (IncludeLocationIds prepend) — covered separately by GQL-094; for fresh cart with no shipment confirmed, expect 0

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] probe_sort_desc.totalCount = probe_baseline.totalCount (sort does not change result set, only order — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)
crossLayerChecks.note: probe_sort_desc.totalCount = probe_baseline.totalCount (sort does not change result set, only order — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)
crossLayerChecks.resolved: probe_sort_desc.totalCount = probe_baseline.totalCount (sort does not change result set, only order — runner-manual cross-OP comparison)

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] probe_sort_desc.items[0].name >= probe_sort_desc.items[1].name (descending order) when totalCount >= 2 — runner-manual ordering check
crossLayerChecks.note: probe_sort_desc.items[0].name >= probe_sort_desc.items[1].name (descending order) when totalCount >= 2 — runner-manual ordering check
crossLayerChecks.resolved: probe_sort_desc.items[0].name >= probe_sort_desc.items[1].name (descending order) when totalCount >= 2 — runner-manual ordering check
